sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: ground_slide
special_mechanics.description: New feature allowing player to perform a ground slide move which can double as an attack

special_mechanics.name: character_switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between three characters (Yuko, Cham, Valna) at any time, each with different weapons and movement properties. Cannot switch during boss fights

physics_values.note: Each character uses different upgradable weapons (Yuko: chargeable energy wave, Cham: whip, Valna: magical blasts)

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Available sources provide gameplay mechanics and level design information but contain no specific physics parameters, velocity values, or sub-pixel system details. Movement mechanics are described qualitatively only (character abilities, weapon types, slide mechanic existence).
